summary: Successfully wired thread-close skill to task system. Updated gather_thread_context() in core.py to include task assessment data (task_info with assessment, what_next, suggested_action). Updated close.py script to output is_action_conversation flag when task_info present. Updated SKILL.md with prescriptive LLM workflow for handling action conversations. Verified end-to-end functionality: context gathering includes task_info with full assessment, complete_action_conversation() function works correctly, and output format matches brief specification.
integration_points: core.py gather_thread_context() now calls check_action_conversation() and assess_task_completion() when action conversation detected, returning task_info with assessment, what_next, and suggested_action fields
close.py script adds is_action_conversation: true flag at top level of JSON output when task_info present for easy LLM detection
core.complete_action_conversation() function provides clean API for LLM to update task status after user confirmation
SKILL.md now includes clear prescriptive workflow: 1) Show assessment, 2) Ask for status confirmation, 3) Call complete_action_conversation(), 4) Include task outcome in close summary
test_results: Verified with test action conversation con_tjRZQy9zfE223F0l -> task 23. Output includes task_info with full assessment (status, completed_milestones, remaining_milestones, next_step, evidence, confidence, actual_minutes, suggested_action, next_step_type, suggested_task_title) and is_action_conversation flag at top level. complete_action_conversation() successfully updates task registry. All brief specifications met.
notes_for_orchestrator: Wiring complete. The integration is fully functional. When thread-close runs on an action conversation, it now automatically gathers task assessment and provides clean API for LLM to update task status. Next steps: D2.2 (Wire Drop Close to Task System) can build on this pattern.
